description: A verb phrase particle that places actions and states in the future, marking them as yet to occur. More than predicting events, 'so' creates linguistic space for intention, planning, and hope—acknowledging that the future exists first in language before manifesting in reality.
sound_symbolism: The particle begins with 's', the flowing sibilant that moves like time itself—continuous, forward-moving, impossible to grasp. This stream of sound meets 'o', the round vowel of open possibility. Together, 'so' creates an acoustic arrow pointing forward: the 's' carries us along time's flow while the 'o' opens into the spaciousness of what hasn't yet taken form. The sound avoids the certainty of stops, maintaining the fluidity appropriate for the always-uncertain future.
grammatical_notes: Occupies Slot 1, appearing immediately before the verb or verb phrase it modifies. Creates explicit future marking in contrast to unmarked present. Combines with aspect and modal particles to create subtle temporal meanings: 'so pa' (will begin), 'so po' (will be able to). Does not distinguish between near and remote future—context provides that information. The particle commits to neither certain prediction nor mere possibility, leaving the ontological status of future events appropriately open.

pillars.solarpunk-values: The particle embodies the solarpunk orientation toward designing futures—not passive waiting but active creation of what comes next. The flowing 's' reminds us that futures are not fixed but shaped by present actions, while the open 'o' maintains possibility.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: While Buddhism emphasizes present-moment awareness, it also acknowledges that skillful action requires considering consequences. 'So' enables this temporal thinking while the flowing sounds remind us that the future remains empty of fixed existence.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Traditional planning works with natural cycles—knowing when to plant requires thinking toward harvest. 'So' carries this practical future-orientation that respects uncertainty while enabling preparation.
